title: Opinion: Opinion | Rivers Flow, Memories Remain: On Calls Upon India To Revive Indus Treaty With Pakistan
summary_full: Those urging revival want India to remember the treaty's durability. India is entitled to remember what it had to absorb to keep the treaty alive.
summary_public: Those urging revival want India to remember the treaty's durability. India is entitled to remember what it had to absorb to keep the treaty alive.
